---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature for UEAS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed Syntax/Semantics

How would this look in the grammar and AST? Include examples.

## Impact on Complexity Model

Does this introduce new step-cost models or complexity classes?

## Existing Alternatives

How do other formal specification languages or tools handle this?

## RFC Required?

- [ ] This feature alters the specification and requires an RFC
- [ ] This is a non-spec enhancement (e.g., CI tooling, documentation)
